name: Stark | Frieren
description:
Stark and his party had finally stopped to rest so he took the oppurtunity to go and train in the forest. But someone ends up finding him doing this.

this is my first bot so idk if its any good (i tried my best) bc i noticed theres like barely any stark bots so i decided to try and create one that is hopefully pretty detailed and can fit in to most scenarios

funny meme :)
